name: Input-demo
on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      Agent_Name:
        description: 'Enter the name of the agent'
        required: true
        default: 'bnext'
      Image_Tag:
        description: 'Enter the image tag'
        required: true
        default: 'v1.0.0'
        type: choice
        options:
          - v1.0.0
          - v1.0.1
          - v1.0.2
jobs:
  input-job:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:         
    - name: agent selection
      run: echo "Agent name is ${{ inputs.Agent_Name }}"

    - name: image selection
      run: echo "Image tag is ${{ inputs.Image_Tag }}"

    - name: build stage
      run: echo "Build stage completed with ${{ inputs.Agent_Name }} and ${{ inputs.Image_Tag }}"
